response.justification: Candidate has well over the required 6+ years of full-stack experience, with recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, and current involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that directly matches the role. Demonstrated breadth across frontend, backend, mobile, and embedded, plus a strong testing/TDD orientation and architecture exposure. Gaps exist around Nest.js, Kotlin/Java in recent roles, and explicit PostgreSQL/Vitest usage, but the core competencies and trajectory are a strong fit for a mid-senior IC position.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js, React, AWS, and MongoDB delivery
Active AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong testing culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and authored testing libraries/workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in primary stack
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated; recent backend work skews to TypeScript and DLang
PostgreSQL and Vitest not explicitly cited, though adjacent skills (MongoDB, Jest-style testing) are present

key_factors.factor: Missing explicit Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java
